mapper.select: merge into album using ( values (#{input.id}::bigint, #{input.title}::text, #{input.details}::jsonb, #{input.primaryArtistId}::bigint) ) as s(id, title, details, primary_artist_id) on (album.id = s.id) or (album.title = s.name and album.primary_artist_id = s.primary_artist_id) when matched then update set title = coalesce(s.title, album.title), details = merge_details(album.details, s.details), primary_artist_id = coalesce(s.primary_artist_id, album.primary_artist_id) when not matched then insert (title, details, primary_artist_id) values (s.title, s.details, s.primary_artist_id) returning album.id, album.title, album.details, album.primary_artist_id, merge_action() as action
select id, title, details, primary_artist_id, null as action from album where id = #{id}

select id, title, details, primary_artist_id, null as action from album where
#{id}
